title: Dataset and Code Replication Package for "Prevalence of SARS-CoV-2 infection and immunity in a New York county in 2022 reveals frequent asymptomatic or undiagnosed infections"
author: Cazer, Casey
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: De-identified data to reproduce the infection and immunity prevalence estimates is available upon request. Data generated by the survey is available with an appropriate IRB protocol to protect against identification of human subjects. Please contact the corresponding author (clc248@cornell.edu) and Cornell University IRB (    irbhp@cornell.edu    ) to initiate an IRB protocol for data sharing.
